tasks.label: $(package) Build ZIP
tasks.description: Build the plugin ZIP in the workspace root

tasks.label: $(verified) Verify plugin ZIP
tasks.description: Run the archive checks against Plugin.zip

tasks.label: $(combine) Build and verify ZIP
tasks.task: WP Plugin: Build and Verify Plugin ZIP
tasks.description: Build the plugin ZIP and verify its archive contents

tasks.label: $(combine) Build+deploy TranslatePress
tasks.task: WP Plugin: Build and Deploy Plugin ZIP to TranslatePress WordPress Pod
tasks.description: Build the plugin ZIP and deploy it to the TranslatePress WordPress pod

tasks.label: $(combine) Build+deploy WP-Globus
tasks.task: WP Plugin: Build and Deploy Plugin ZIP to WP-Globus WordPress Pod
tasks.description: Build the plugin ZIP and deploy it to the WP-Globus WordPress pod

tasks.label: $(combine) Build+deploy SlyBase / Polylang
tasks.task: WP Plugin: Build and Deploy Plugin ZIP to SlyBase WordPress Pod
tasks.description: Build the plugin ZIP and deploy it to the SlyBase WordPress pod

tasks.label: $(cloud-upload) Deploy all 3 pods
tasks.task: WP Plugin: Deploy Plugin ZIP to All WordPress Pods
tasks.description: Deploy the existing plugin ZIP to the TranslatePress, WP-Globus, and SlyBase WordPress pods

tasks.label: $(cloud-upload) Deploy TranslatePress
tasks.task: WP Plugin: Deploy Plugin ZIP to TranslatePress WordPress Pod
tasks.description: Deploy the existing plugin ZIP to the TranslatePress WordPress pod

tasks.label: $(cloud-upload) Deploy WP-Globus
tasks.task: WP Plugin: Deploy Plugin ZIP to WP-Globus WordPress Pod
tasks.description: Deploy the existing plugin ZIP to the WP-Globus WordPress pod

tasks.label: $(cloud-upload) Deploy SlyBase / Polylang
tasks.task: WP Plugin: Deploy Plugin ZIP to SlyBase WordPress Pod
tasks.description: Deploy the existing plugin ZIP to the SlyBase WordPress pod

tasks.label: $(file-symlink-file) Prepare release files
tasks.description: Generate language files and sync changelog.txt from CHANGELOG.md

VsCodeTaskButtons.tasks.label: $(tools) Release files
VsCodeTaskButtons.tasks.description: Generate language files and sync changelog.txt
